sources.selection_reason: Sandbox session state survives as warm execution continuity.

temperature_policy.hot: Current-turn workspace context such as authority docs, recent changes, and explicit working-set files.
temperature_policy.warm: Continuity-bearing state reused into the run, such as instruction sets, chronicle matches, and resumable continuation artifacts.
temperature_policy.cold: Durable candidate context not automatically in the active budget, such as graph-grounded retrieval candidates.

notes: ENV-04 records hot, warm, and cold context provenance per run instead of leaving selection lineage implicit.
Discarded cold candidates are first-class audit state because budgeting decisions matter to replay and operator inspection.
HOS-02 extends the same temperature vocabulary into execution packs, environment summaries, Mission Control projections, and reviewed durable-memory promotion candidates.
Canonical ENV-04 sample for repo-owned artifact governance.
